lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜੋ ਕਹਤਾ ॥੪੬॥
lines.translit: naanak har har guramukh jo kahataa |46|
lines.english: Har, Har, and rises above all social classes and status symbols. ||46||
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਹਉ ਕਰਤ ਬਿਹਾਨੀਆ ਸਾਕਤ ਮੁਗਧ ਅਜਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: hau hau karat bihaaneea saakat mugadh ajaan |
lines.english: Acting in egotism, selfishness and conceit, the foolish, ignorant, faithless cynic wastes his life.
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ੜੜਕਿ ਮੁਏ ਜਿਉ ਤ੍ਰਿਖਾਵੰਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਰਤਿ ਕਮਾਨ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: rrarrak mue jiau trikhaavant naanak kirat kamaan |1|
lines.english: He dies in agony, like one dying of thirst; O Nanak, this is because of the deeds he has done. ||1||
RARRA: Conflict is eliminated in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy;
When the Beautiful Lord abides within the heart,
meditate in adoration on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the essence of karma and Dharma.
conflict is erased and ended.
his heart is filled with corruption and egotistical intellect.
RARRA: For the Gurmukh, conflict is eliminated in an instant,
The foolish, faithless cynic picks arguments

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਕੀ ਮਨ ਓਟ ਗਹੁ ਉਕਤਿ ਸਿਆਨਪ ਤਿਆਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo kee man ott gahu ukat siaanap tiaag |
lines.english: O mind, grasp the Support of the Holy Saint; give up your clever arguments.
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਦੀਖਿਆ ਜਿਹ ਮਨਿ ਬਸੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur deekhiaa jih man basai naanak masatak bhaag |1|
lines.english: One who has the Guru's Teachings within his mind, O Nanak, has good destiny inscribed upon his forehead. ||1||
O Nanak, through the Teachings. ||47||
I am so tired of reciting the Shaastras, the Simritees and the Vedas.
SASSA: I have now entered Your Sanctuary, Lord;
Pauree:
that without meditating on the Lord, there is no emancipation.
With each and every breath, I make mistakes.
I searched and searched and searched, and now I have come to realize,
I seek Your Sanctuary - please save me, Merciful Lord!
You are All-powerful, endless and infinite.
Nanak is Your child, O Lord of the World. ||48||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੀ ਆਇਆ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਕਰਨੈ ਜੋਗੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak drisattee aaeaa usatat karanai jog |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, then He comes to be seen - the One who is worthy of praise. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੁਦੀ ਮਿਟੀ ਤਬ ਸੁਖ ਭਏ ਮਨ ਤਨ ਭਏ ਅਰੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: khudee mittee tab sukh bhe man tan bhe arog |
lines.english: When selfishness and conceit are erased, peace comes, and the mind and body are healed.
Salok:
When the mortal being becomes totally humble,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਊਨੇ ਸੁਭਰ ਭਰਾਹੂ ॥
lines.translit: jo khin meh aoone subhar bharaahoo |
lines.english: who fills the empty to over-flowing in an instant.
Pauree:
KHAKHA: Praise and extol Him on High,
then he meditates night and day on God, the Detached Lord of Nirvaanaa.
Such is the Infinite, Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਵੈ ਖਸਮ ਤ ਉਆ ਸੁਖੁ ਦੇਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhaavai khasam ta uaa sukh detaa |
lines.english: If it pleases the Will of our Lord and Master, then He blesses us with peace.
He forgives countless sins in an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿ ਕਹਉ ਸੁਨਿ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਰਨਿ ਪਰਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sat khau sun man mere saran parahu har raae |
lines.english: I speak the Truth - listen, O my mind: take to the Sanctuary of the Sovereign Lord King.
Salok:
O Nanak, our Lord and Master is merciful forever. ||49||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਕਤਿ ਸਿਆਨਪ ਸਗਲ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਏ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aukat siaanap sagal tiaag naanak le samaae |1|
lines.english: Give up all your clever tricks, O Nanak, and He shall absorb you into Himself. ||1||
Pauree:
SASSA: Give up your clever tricks, you ignorant fool!
You may practice a thousand forms of cleverness,
but not even one will go along with you in the end.
God is not pleased with clever tricks and commands.
Meditate on that Lord, that Lord, day and night.
O soul, He alone shall go along with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਬਿਆਪੈ ॥੫੦॥
lines.translit: naanak taa kau dookh na biaapai |50|
lines.english: O Nanak, are not afflicted by suffering. ||50||
Those whom the Lord Himself commits to the service of the Holy,
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਥਾਨ ਥਨੰਤਰਿ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sabh meh rav rahiaa thaan thanantar soe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord is pervading everywhere; He is contained in all spaces and interspaces. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮੁਖ ਤੇ ਬੋਲਨਾ ਮਨਿ ਵੂਠੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har har mukh te bolanaa man vootthai sukh hoe |
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, and keeping it in your mind, you shall find peace.
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇਰਉ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਸਗਲ ਕੈ ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹੇ ਭਗਵਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: herau ghatt ghatt sagal kai poor rahe bhagavaan |
lines.english: Behold! The Lord God is totally pervading each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਵਤ ਆਏ ਸਦ ਸਦੀਵ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨ ॥
lines.translit: hovat aae sad sadeev dukh bhanjan gur giaan |
lines.english: Forever and ever, the Guru's wisdom has been the Destroyer of pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਛੁਟਕੈ ਹੋਇ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਤਿਹ ਹਉ ਨਾਹੀ ਤਹ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: hau chhuttakai hoe anand tih hau naahee teh aap |
lines.english: Quieting the ego, ecstasy is obtained. Where the ego does not exist, God Himself is there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਤੇ ਦੂਖ ਜਨਮਹ ਮਰਨ ਸੰਤਸੰਗ ਪਰਤਾਪ ॥
lines.translit: hate dookh janamah maran santasang parataap |
lines.english: The pain of birth and death is removed, by the power of the Society of the Saints.
He becomes kind to those who lovingly enshrine the Name of the Merciful Lord within their hearts,
In the Society of the Saints.
